response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced and skilled developer with a strong background in full-stack development, but his seniority and extensive expertise may exceed the requirements for this junior/mid-level role. While his technical skills align well with the job description, the role's focus on renewable energy/construction technology and on-site presence may not fully leverage his current senior-level experience or interest in AI and developer tooling.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, matching core job requirements.
Proven track record in building scalable platforms and integrating diverse data sources, relevant to the role's responsibilities.
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement, demonstrating passion for clean architecture and collaboration.
concerns: Senior-level experience may lead to misalignment with the junior/mid-level scope and compensation expectations.
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL or Nest.js, though other relational databases and backend frameworks are listed.
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with potential preference for remote or hybrid work, given his seniority.
